revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 駒形大重神社 |画像 = [[File:駒形大重神社の拝殿 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
拝殿 {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[御所市]]楢原1662 |ISO = JP-23 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 27|緯度秒 = 17.3 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 42|経度秒 = 39 |祭神 = 木股神、及び[[滋野貞主]]、あるいは[[葛城稚犬養網田]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[7月13日]]、[[10月16日]] |神事 = |地図 = Japan Nara }} '''駒形大重神社'''（こまがたおおしげじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[御所市]]楢原にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[1907年]]（[[明治]]40年）、駒形神社に、東方の字田口に鎮座していた大重神社を合祀して現在の形となった[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html 駒形大重神社] - 御所市[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 駒形大重神社] - [[コトバンク]]。 駒形神社は木股様（このまたさま）と伝承される[[地主神]]を祭神とする神社なのに対して、大重神社は『[[延喜式神名帳]]』[[大和国]]・[[葛上郡]]の項目に記載されている「葛木大重神社」と比定されている[[式内社]]であり、その祭神は[[滋野貞主]]か、[[葛城稚犬養網田]]とされる。 == 祭神 == * 木股神 * [[滋野貞主]]、あるいは[[葛城稚犬養網田]] == 境内 == 駒形大重神社の境内社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|境内社 駒形大重神社の「無事蛙」 御所市楢原 The stone frog named “Buji Kaeru” in Komagata-Ōshige-jinja 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|無事蛙 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|二の鳥居 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|一の鳥居 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{デフォルトソート:こまかたおおしけしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|WD=Q134917287}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|de|Shintō-Schrein|zh|神社|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|ru|Дзиндзя|WD=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160338}}
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}}
* {{ill|Kanpei Shosha (Engishiki)|WD=Q135206476}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|WD=Q135026601}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja|大和国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11433427}}

== official name (P1448) ==

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

revision.comment: 2 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 駒形大重神社 |画像 = [[File:駒形大重神社の拝殿 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[御所市]]楢原1662 |ISO = JP-23 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 27|緯度秒 = 17.3 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 42|経度秒 = 39 |祭神 = 木股神、及び[[滋野貞主]]、あるいは[[葛城稚犬養網田]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[7月13日]]、[[10月16日]] |神事 = |地図 = Japan Nara }} '''駒形大重神社'''（こまがたおおしげじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[御所市]]楢原にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[1907年]]（[[明治]]40年）、駒形神社に、東方の字田口に鎮座していた大重神社を合祀して現在の形となった[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html 駒形大重神社] - 御所市[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 駒形大重神社] - [[コトバンク]]。 駒形神社は木股様（このまたさま）と伝承される[[地主神]]を祭神とする神社なのに対して、大重神社は『[[延喜式神名帳]]』[[大和国]]・[[葛上郡]]の項目に記載されている「葛木大重神社」と比定されている[[式内社]]であり、その祭神は[[滋野貞主]]か、[[葛城稚犬養網田]]とされる。 == 祭神 == * 木股神 * [[滋野貞主]]、あるいは[[葛城稚犬養網田]] == 境内 == 駒形大重神社の境内社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|境内社 駒形大重神社の「無事蛙」 御所市楢原 The stone frog named “Buji Kaeru” in Komagata-Ōshige-jinja 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|無事蛙 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|二の鳥居 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|一の鳥居 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{デフォルトソート:こまかたおおしけしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]]

[[Category:Kanpei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|駒形大重神社|version=106920994|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 駒形大重神社 |画像 = [[File:駒形大重神社の拝殿 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[御所市]]楢原1662 |ISO = JP-23 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 27|緯度秒 = 17.3 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 42|経度秒 = 39 |祭神 = 木股神、及び[[滋野貞主]]、あるいは[[葛城稚犬養網田]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[7月13日]]、[[10月16日]] |神事 = |地図 = Japan Nara }} '''駒形大重神社'''（こまがたおおしげじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[御所市]]楢原にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[1907年]]（[[明治]]40年）、駒形神社に、東方の字田口に鎮座していた大重神社を合祀して現在の形となった[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html 駒形大重神社] - 御所市[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 駒形大重神社] - [[コトバンク]]。 駒形神社は木股様（このまたさま）と伝承される[[地主神]]を祭神とする神社なのに対して、大重神社は『[[延喜式神名帳]]』[[大和国]]・[[葛上郡]]の項目に記載されている「葛木大重神社」と比定されている[[式内社]]であり、その祭神は[[滋野貞主]]か、[[葛城稚犬養網田]]とされる。 == 祭神 == * 木股神 * [[滋野貞主]]、あるいは[[葛城稚犬養網田]] == 境内 == 駒形大重神社の境内社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|境内社 駒形大重神社の「無事蛙」 御所市楢原 The stone frog named “Buji Kaeru” in Komagata-Ōshige-jinja 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|無事蛙 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|二の鳥居 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|一の鳥居 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] ==End Japanese==

{{translated page|ja|駒形大重神社|version=106920994|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 駒形大重神社 |画像 = [[File:駒形大重神社の拝殿 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原1662 |ISO = JP-23 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 27|緯度秒 = 17.3 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 42|経度秒 = 39 |祭神 = 木股神、及び{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|村社}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|7月13日|Q2687}}、{{jalink|10月16日|Q2963}} |神事 = |地図 = Japan Nara }} '''駒形大重神社'''（こまがたおおしげじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 == 概要 == {{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年）、駒形神社に、東方の字田口に鎮座していた大重神社を合祀して現在の形となった[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html 駒形大重神社] - 御所市[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 駒形大重神社] - {{jalink|コトバンク|Q11302260}}。 駒形神社は木股様（このまたさま）と伝承される{{jalink|地主神|Q4160872}}を祭神とする神社なのに対して、大重神社は『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』{{jalink|大和国|Q907495}}・{{jalink|葛上郡|Q11620858}}の項目に記載されている「葛木大重神社」と比定されている{{jalink|式内社}}であり、その祭神は{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}か、{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}}とされる。 == 祭神 == * 木股神 * {{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} == 境内 == 駒形大重神社の境内社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|境内社 駒形大重神社の「無事蛙」 御所市楢原 The stone frog named “Buji Kaeru” in Komagata-Ōshige-jinja 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|無事蛙 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|二の鳥居 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|一の鳥居 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Komagataooshige Shrine'''|駒形大重神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 駒形大重神社 |画像 = [[File:駒形大重神社の拝殿 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原1662 |ISO = JP-23 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 27|緯度秒 = 17.3 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 42|経度秒 = 39 |祭神 = 木股神、及び{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|7月13日|Q2687}}、{{jalink|10月16日|Q2963}} |神事 = |地図 = Japan Nara }} '''駒形大重神社'''（こまがたおおしげじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 概要 === {{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年）、駒形神社に、東方の字田口に鎮座していた大重神社を合祀して現在の形となった[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html 駒形大重神社] - 御所市[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 駒形大重神社] - {{jalink|コトバンク|Q11302260}}。 駒形神社は木股様（このまたさま）と伝承される{{jalink|地主神|Q4160872}}を祭神とする神社なのに対して、大重神社は『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』{{jalink|大和国|Q907495}}・{{jalink|葛上郡|Q11620858}}の項目に記載されている「葛木大重神社」と比定されている{{jalink|式内社}}であり、その祭神は{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}か、{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}}とされる。 === 祭神 === * 木股神 * {{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} === 境内 === 駒形大重神社の境内社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|境内社 駒形大重神社の「無事蛙」 御所市楢原 The stone frog named “Buji Kaeru” in Komagata-Ōshige-jinja 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|無事蛙 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|二の鳥居 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|一の鳥居 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{デフォルトソート:こまかたおおしけしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]]

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 駒形大重神社 |画像 = [[File:駒形大重神社の拝殿 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原1662 |ISO = JP-23 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 27|緯度秒 = 17.3 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 42|経度秒 = 39 |祭神 = 木股神、及び{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|7月13日|Q2687}}、{{jalink|10月16日|Q2963}} |神事 = |地図 = Japan Nara }} '''駒形大重神社'''（こまがたおおしげじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 概要 === {{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年）、駒形神社に、東方の字田口に鎮座していた大重神社を合祀して現在の形となった[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html 駒形大重神社] - 御所市[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 駒形大重神社] - {{jalink|コトバンク|Q11302260}}。 駒形神社は木股様（このまたさま）と伝承される{{jalink|地主神|Q4160872}}を祭神とする神社なのに対して、大重神社は『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』{{jalink|大和国|Q907495}}・{{jalink|葛上郡|Q11620858}}の項目に記載されている「葛木大重神社」と比定されている{{jalink|式内社}}であり、その祭神は{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}か、{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}}とされる。 === 祭神 === * 木股神 * {{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} === 境内 === 駒形大重神社の境内社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|境内社 駒形大重神社の「無事蛙」 御所市楢原 The stone frog named “Buji Kaeru” in Komagata-Ōshige-jinja 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|無事蛙 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|二の鳥居 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|一の鳥居 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{デフォルトソート:こまかたおおしけしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 駒形大重神社 |画像 = [[File:駒形大重神社の拝殿 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原1662 |ISO = JP-23 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 27|緯度秒 = 17.3 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 42|経度秒 = 39 |祭神 = 木股神、及び{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|7月13日|Q2687}}、{{jalink|10月16日|Q2963}} |神事 = |地図 = Japan Nara }} '''駒形大重神社'''（こまがたおおしげじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 概要 === {{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年）、駒形神社に、東方の字田口に鎮座していた大重神社を合祀して現在の形となった[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html 駒形大重神社] - 御所市[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 駒形大重神社] - {{jalink|コトバンク|Q11302260}}。 駒形神社は木股様（このまたさま）と伝承される{{jalink|地主神|Q4160872}}を祭神とする神社なのに対して、大重神社は『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』{{jalink|大和国|Q907495}}・{{jalink|葛上郡|Q11620858}}の項目に記載されている「葛木大重神社」と比定されている{{jalink|式内社}}であり、その祭神は{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}か、{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}}とされる。 === 祭神 === * 木股神 * {{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} === 境内 === 駒形大重神社の境内社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|境内社 駒形大重神社の「無事蛙」 御所市楢原 The stone frog named “Buji Kaeru” in Komagata-Ōshige-jinja 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|無事蛙 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|二の鳥居 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|一の鳥居 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{デフォルトソート:こまかたおおしけしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 駒形大重神社 |画像 = [[File:駒形大重神社の拝殿 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原1662 |ISO = JP-23 |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 27|緯度秒 = 17.3 |経度度 =135|経度分 = 42|経度秒 = 39 |祭神 = 木股神、及び{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} |神体 = |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|7月13日|Q2687}}、{{jalink|10月16日|Q2963}} |神事 = |地図 = Japan Nara }} '''駒形大重神社'''（こまがたおおしげじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|御所市|Q847334}}楢原にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 概要 === {{jalink|1907年|Q2048}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}40年）、駒形神社に、東方の字田口に鎮座していた大重神社を合祀して現在の形となった[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html 駒形大重神社] - 御所市[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 駒形大重神社] - {{jalink|コトバンク|Q11302260}}。 駒形神社は木股様（このまたさま）と伝承される{{jalink|地主神|Q4160872}}を祭神とする神社なのに対して、大重神社は『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』{{jalink|大和国|Q907495}}・{{jalink|葛上郡|Q11620858}}の項目に記載されている「葛木大重神社」と比定されている{{jalink|式内社}}であり、その祭神は{{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}か、{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}}とされる。 === 祭神 === * 木股神 * {{jalink|滋野貞主|Q11564997}}、あるいは{{jalink|葛城稚犬養網田|Q51914871}} === 境内 === 駒形大重神社の境内社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|境内社 駒形大重神社の「無事蛙」 御所市楢原 The stone frog named “Buji Kaeru” in Komagata-Ōshige-jinja 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|無事蛙 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|二の鳥居 駒形大重神社 御所市楢原 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|一の鳥居 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{デフォルトソート:こまかたおおしけしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets v destinations]]

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets v destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Komagataoshigejinja}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:御所市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Gose, Nara]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * カツラキ- == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県御所市朝町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:駒形大重神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134928901}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Gose, Nara]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Gose, Nara]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Komagata-Ōshige Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|27|17.3|N|135|42|39|E}}}} |Location = Narahara 1662, Gose City, Nara Prefecture |ISO = JP-23 |Latitude degrees = 34|Latitude minutes = 27|Latitude seconds = 17.3 |Longitude degrees = 135|Longitude minutes = 42|Longitude seconds = 39 |Enshrined deities = Kimata-no-Kami, and Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = Shikinaisha, former village shrine |Founded = |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites, etc. = |Annual festivals = July 13, October 16 |Rituals = |Map = Japan Nara }} '''Komagata-Ōshige Shrine''' (こまがたおおしげじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Narahara, Gose City, Nara Prefecture. === Overview === In 1907 (Meiji 40), Ōshige Shrine, which had been enshrined in the eastern area known as Taguchi, was merged into Komagata Shrine, forming its present configuration.[https://www.city.gose.nara.jp/kankou/0000001414.html Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Gose City[https://kotobank.jp/word/駒形大重神社-3081535 Komagata-Ōshige Shrine] – Kotobank. While Komagata Shrine enshrines a local tutelary deity known in legend as Kimata-sama, Ōshige Shrine is identified with “Katsuraki Ōshige Shrine” listed in the Yamato Province, Katsukami District section of the *Engishiki Jinmyōchō*, making it a Shikinaisha. Its enshrined deity is said to be either Shigeno no Sadamochi or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida.. === Enshrined deities === * Kimata-no-Kami * Shigeno no Sadamochi, or Katsuragi no Wakainukai Amida === Shrine grounds === Komagata-Ōshige Shrine auxiliary shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Auxiliary shrine Stone frog called “Buji Kaeru” at Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|“Buji Kaeru” (Safe-return frog) Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio.jpg|Second torii gate Komagata-Ōshige Shrine, Narahara, Gose City 2013.5.24 - panoramio (1).jpg|First torii gate === Notes === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Komagata-Ōshige Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:御所市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings in Gose, Nara]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]
